name: Boned Oysters
recipeInstructions:
Use only the large Asiatic oysters caught in the Indian Ocean, Black Sea,
or the Persian and Arabian gulfs.
Use the delicious white meat only. Discard the round white bone sometimes
discovered inside the shell.
Drain the oysters. Roll them in flour. Heat oil until hot in a large frying pan.
Fry the oysters on medium-high heat for 5 minutes, turning over once. Sprinkle with seasonings and serve.
